# Find Links

Tests for `--find-links` package sources in resolution.

## Local directory

### Find links from directory

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::find_links_directory -->

Resolve packages from a local directory using `--find-links`.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
tqdm
numpy
werkzeug @ https://files.pythonhosted.org/packages/c3/fc/254c3e9b5feb89ff5b9076a23218dafbc99c96ac5941e900b71206e6313b/werkzeug-3.0.1-py3-none-any.whl
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in --find-links ${ROOT}/test/links
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile requirements.in
markupsafe==2.1.5
    # via werkzeug
numpy==1.26.4
    # via -r requirements.in
tqdm==1000.0.0
    # via -r requirements.in
werkzeug @ https://files.pythonhosted.org/packages/c3/fc/254c3e9b5feb89ff5b9076a23218dafbc99c96ac5941e900b71206e6313b/werkzeug-3.0.1-py3-none-any.whl
    # via -r requirements.in

----- stderr -----
Resolved 4 packages in [TIME]
```

## Remote URL

### Find links from URL

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::find_links_url -->

Resolve packages from a remote URL using `--find-links`.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
tqdm
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in --no-index --find-links https://astral-sh.github.io/pytorch-mirror/whl/torch_stable.html --exclude-newer 2025-01-30T00:00:00Z
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile requirements.in --no-index
tqdm==4.64.1
    # via -r requirements.in

----- stderr -----
Resolved 1 package in [TIME]
```

### Find links via environment variable

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::find_links_env_var -->

Environment variables in `--find-links` are expanded.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
tqdm
--find-links ${URL}
```

```console
$ URL=https://astral-sh.github.io/pytorch-mirror/whl/torch_stable.html uv pip compile requirements.in --no-index
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile requirements.in --no-index
tqdm==4.64.1
    # via -r requirements.in

----- stderr -----
Resolved 1 package in [TIME]
```

### Find links in requirements file

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::find_links_requirements_txt -->

`--find-links` can be specified in the requirements file.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
-f https://astral-sh.github.io/pytorch-mirror/whl/torch_stable.html
tqdm
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in --no-index --emit-find-links
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile requirements.in --no-index --emit-find-links
--find-links https://astral-sh.github.io/pytorch-mirror/whl/torch_stable.html

tqdm==4.64.1
    # via -r requirements.in

----- stderr -----
Resolved 1 package in [TIME]
```

### Find links via UV_FIND_LINKS

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::find_links_uv_env_var -->

The `UV_FIND_LINKS` environment variable sets find-links.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
tqdm
```

```console
$ UV_FIND_LINKS=https://astral-sh.github.io/pytorch-mirror/whl/torch_stable.html uv pip compile requirements.in --no-index
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile requirements.in --no-index
tqdm==4.64.1
    # via -r requirements.in

----- stderr -----
Resolved 1 package in [TIME]
```

## Offline mode

### Offline without cache

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::offline_registry -->

Offline mode fails without a populated cache.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
black==23.10.1
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in --offline
success: false
exit_code: 1
----- stdout -----

----- stderr -----
  × No solution found when resolving dependencies:
  ╰─▶ Because black was not found in the cache and you require black==23.10.1, we can conclude that your requirements are unsatisfiable.

      hint: Packages were unavailable because the network was disabled. When the network is disabled, registry packages may only be read from the cache.
```

### Offline with find-links

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::offline_find_links -->

Offline mode with `--find-links` shows network disabled hint.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
tqdm
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in --find-links https://astral-sh.github.io/pytorch-mirror/whl/torch_stable.html --offline --exclude-newer 2025-01-30T00:00:00Z
success: false
exit_code: 1
----- stdout -----

----- stderr -----
  × No solution found when resolving dependencies:
  ╰─▶ Because tqdm was not found in the cache and you require tqdm, we can conclude that your requirements are unsatisfiable.

      hint: Packages were unavailable because the network was disabled. When the network is disabled, registry packages may only be read from the cache.
```

### Offline with find-links and no-index

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::offline_find_links -->

Offline mode with both `--find-links` and `--no-index`.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
tqdm
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in --find-links https://astral-sh.github.io/pytorch-mirror/whl/torch_stable.html --no-index --offline --exclude-newer 2025-01-30T00:00:00Z
success: false
exit_code: 1
----- stdout -----

----- stderr -----
  × No solution found when resolving dependencies:
  ╰─▶ Because tqdm was not found in the cache and you require tqdm, we can conclude that your requirements are unsatisfiable.

      hint: Packages were unavailable because the network was disabled. When the network is disabled, registry packages may only be read from the cache.
```

### Offline direct URL

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::offline_direct_url -->

Offline mode fails for direct URLs not in cache.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
iniconfig @ https://files.pythonhosted.org/packages/ef/a6/62565a6e1cf69e10f5727360368e451d4b7f58beeac6173dc9db836a5b46/iniconfig-2.0.0-py3-none-any.whl
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in --offline
success: false
exit_code: 1
----- stdout -----

----- stderr -----
  × Failed to download `iniconfig @ https://files.pythonhosted.org/packages/ef/a6/62565a6e1cf69e10f5727360368e451d4b7f58beeac6173dc9db836a5b46/iniconfig-2.0.0-py3-none-any.whl`
  ╰─▶ Network connectivity is disabled, but the requested data wasn't found in the cache for: `https://files.pythonhosted.org/packages/ef/a6/62565a6e1cf69e10f5727360368e451d4b7f58beeac6173dc9db836a5b46/iniconfig-2.0.0-py3-none-any.whl`
```
